# RisonAI Tech
> Product engineering and AI automation company based in India. We build revenue-focused AI systems, SaaS platforms, CRM workflows, and chatbots for startups, healthcare, real estate, and SMB teams.

## Company Facts
- Legal/Brand Name: RisonAI Tech (Risonai Tech)
- Website: https://risonaitech.com
- HQ: 196, Ground Floor, New RK Puram, Panipat, Haryana 132103, India
- Contact Email: hello@risonaitech.com
- Contact Phone: +91 83681 37724
- Primary Service Areas: Delhi, Gurgaon, Panipat, NCR, remote across India

## What We Do
- AI Automation Systems: lead routing, intake automation, workflow orchestration, CRM sync
- SaaS Development: MVP to multi-tenant SaaS with billing, admin dashboards, API layers
- CRM Development: custom CRM builds and HubSpot/Zoho extensions with AI actions
- AI Chatbot Development: WhatsApp + web chatbots with RAG knowledge retrieval

## Pricing Benchmarks (INR)
- AI Automation: 30,000 to 60,000 (single workflow), 80,000 to 1,80,000 (multi-workflow), 2,00,000+ (enterprise)
- SaaS Development: 1,20,000 to 2,50,000 (MVP), 3,00,000 to 8,00,000 (growth), 8,00,000+ (enterprise)
- CRM Development: 40,000 to 1,00,000 (integration), 1,00,000 to 3,00,000 (custom CRM), 3,00,000+ (AI CRM)
- AI Chatbots: 20,000 to 50,000 (basic), 50,000 to 1,20,000 (lead bot), 1,20,000+ (RAG + integrations)

## Deployment Timelines
- AI automation workflow: 2 to 3 weeks
- Chatbot rollout: 2 to 8 weeks
- CRM implementation: 4 to 16 weeks
- SaaS MVP: 6 to 10 weeks
- Production SaaS platform: 12 to 20 weeks

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Python, FastAPI, Express
- Data: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase
- AI: OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector retrieval (RAG)
- Integrations: WhatsApp Business API, Razorpay, Stripe, HubSpot, Zoho
- Deployment: Vercel, AWS, Railway, Docker

## Outcome Benchmarks
- Common first-response improvement after automation: 60% to 80%
- Typical repetitive-task reduction with RAG/chat automation: 40% to 70%
- Frequent operational time saved for SMB teams: 25 to 45 hours per month
- Client retention: 100%
- Products/systems shipped: 40+

## Differentiation
- Operator-led delivery with product-engineering depth
- Fixed-scope, milestone-based execution
- Source-code and infrastructure handover at close
- Domain experience in healthcare and real estate product systems
- Practical AI implementations focused on measurable business outcomes
